name: Catalent, Inc.
description: Catalent, Inc. is a global provider of delivery technologies, development, and manufacturing solutions for drugs, biologics, cell and gene therapies, and consumer health products. The company specializes in helping pharmaceutical and biotechnology firms optimize the development, launch, and supply of their products. Catalent operates through advanced drug delivery technologies, clinical supply services, and biologics development, serving customers in over 100 countries.
